title: galactia tenuiflora var. villosa
intro: Galactia tenuiflora var. villosa, also known as villose milk pea or hairy milkpea, is a plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting potential antidiabetic properties. Galactia tenuiflora var. villosa is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its roots and leaves can also be used to make a decoction or tincture for medicinal purposes.
